309 – 910 West 8th Avenue · Fairview · Vancouver

Cathedral light,
corner views, steps from everything.

610 sq ft  ·  1 bed  ·  Mountain & downtown views  ·  Broadway SkyTrain <1 block

$615,000 For sale by owner  ·  Storage & parking included

Few 610 sq ft homes feel like this one. A soaring cathedral ceiling with a large pyramid skylight — fitted with insulating film — floods the living room with daylight without the heat. Corner floor-to-ceiling windows frame treetop and mountain views on two sides, with a sliding door to a private balcony. A ceiling fan sits within the skylight structure itself, keeping the air moving on warm evenings. The gas fireplace with its wood mantel and built-in shelving anchors the room on the other side.

The kitchen has been thoughtfully upgraded: quartz countertops, a sea-glass subway tile backsplash, warm oak cabinetry with glass-front uppers, pendant lighting, and stainless appliances including a double oven range and over-range microwave. A breakfast bar pass-through opens to the living space — good for entertaining, even in a compact footprint.

The bathroom was renovated with care: heated tile floors (Nuheat programmable thermostat), a vessel sink on a floating white vanity with quartz counter, a frameless glass walk-in shower with rain head, two heated towel racks, and under-vanity lighting. Upgraded hardwood-style floors with sound-deadening insulation run throughout the rest of the unit. Storage locker and parking included.
